metadata.file_name: Duran Duran - Girls on Film (Night Mix) [Extended Version].flac
metadata.title: Girls on Film (Night Mix) [Extended Version]
metadata.lyrics:
[01:37.98] See them walking hand in hand
[01:39.65] Across the bridge at midnight
[01:44.04] Heads turning as the lights flashing out
[01:47.89] Are so bright
[01:51.94] And walk right out to the four line track
[01:53.71] There's a camera rolling on her back
[01:56.99] On her back
[01:59.05] And I sense a rhythm humming in a frenzy
[02:01.72] All the way down her spine
[02:05.82] Girls on film
[02:12.04] Girls on film
[02:15.88] Girls on film
[02:19.45] Girls on film
[02:22.95] 
[02:31.18] Lipstick cherry all over the lens as she's falling
[02:38.85] And miles of sharp blue water coming in
[02:41.44] Where she lies
[02:45.69] The diving man's coming up for air
[02:47.49] 'Cause the crowd all love pulling Dolly by the hair
[02:50.55] By the hair
[02:52.64] And she wonders how she ever got here
[02:55.21] As she goes under again
[03:00.73] Girls on film (Two minutes later)
[03:05.86] Girls on film
[03:09.45] Girls on film (Got your picture)
[03:13.15] Girls on film
[03:16.59] 
[04:28.20] To the one last glimpse into the night
[04:31.36] I'm touching close
[04:33.70] I'm holding bright
[04:36.39] Shudders in a whisper, and come closer
[04:40.06] Take me up 'til I'm shooting a star
[04:49.59] Shooting a star
[04:55.77] I'm shooting a star
[05:46.02]
